name: TradeUP Acquisition Corp. Unit
summary: TradeUP Acquisition Corp. Unit was a unit consisting of one share of common stock and one warrant of a blank check company (SPAC). The company was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which has likely occurred, rendering the units no longer valid. It was previously headquartered in Shanghai, China.
